_comment: Structured JSON schema for CAG image generation prompts. Use when calling Higgsfield, Nano Banana, or OpenAI to ensure precise, CITES-compliant parrot data.

congo.species: Congo African Grey Parrot (Psittacus erithacus erithacus)
congo.body_color: medium grey with white scalloping on face and chest
congo.distinguishing_feature: bright red tail, larger body, lighter grey overall

timneh.species: Timneh African Grey Parrot (Psittacus erithacus timneh)
timneh.body_color: darker charcoal grey with less scalloping
timneh.distinguishing_feature: maroon tail, smaller body, darker grey, horn-colored upper beak

breeder.environment: home aviary — raised inside family home, not commercial facility

visual_style.image_environment: warm home interior, natural wood perches, soft window light
visual_style.mood: trust, warmth, expertise — NOT wild or exotic

prompt_safety.never_include: wild-caught, imported, trapped, CITES violation, illegal
prompt_safety.cites_framing: All birds bred in our Midland TX home aviary with full CITES Appendix II documentation
